name: Legion
description: Intensify: Put 1 Crestfallen into your action bar. Shuffle a copy of this minion into your deck.

name: Windcliffe Protector
description: Provoke When a friendly Windcliffe Alarmist dies, transform this minion into a Windcliffe Alarmist.

name: Windcliffe Alarmist
description: Opening Gambit: Summon a 5/5 Windcliffe Protector with Provoke from your deck.

name: Grand Strategos
description: Trial: Summon 12 minions with 1 or less Attack. Destiny: Promote other friendly minions at the end of your turn.

name: Indominus
description: Your General is Invulnerable BUT cannot move or attack.

name: War Exorcist
description: Provoke At the start of your turn, Holy Immolation your damaged minions.

name: Hideatsu the Ebon Ox
description: Trial: Summon 7 minions from your action bar with different costs. Destiny: Summon friendly minions to deal their cost as damage to an enemy.

name: Bakezori
description: Whenever this minion is moved for any reason, draw a card.

name: Kaido Expert
description: Backstab: (1). Whenever this minion backstabs, summon a minion with Backstab that costs 2 or less from your deck nearby.

name: Massacre Artist
description: Backstab: (2). After this minion attacks and backstabs, all attacks are backstabs this turn.

name: Xenkai Cannoneer
description: Ranged Whenever you summon a minion with Ranged, that minion gains Rush.

name: Coalfist
description: Intensify: Give a random nearby friendly minion +2 Attack this turn.

name: Orbrider
description: Opening Gambit: Return a nearby friendly minion to your action bar.

name: Fifth Canopic
description: The enemy General cannot cast their Bloodbound Spell.

name: Dustdrinker
description: Intensify: Deal 1 damage to the enemy General and this minion gains +1 Health.

name: Notion of Starless Eternity
description: Trial: General reaches the other edge of the battlefield with an equipped artifact. Destiny: Each equipped artifact gives your General a tier of ascension.

name: Khanuum-ka
description: Flying, Rush Dying Wish: A random friendly Dervish disappears, summoning a Khanuum-ka in its place.

name: Swarmking Scarab
description: Blast Whenever this minion blasts, summon 1/1 Scarabyte with Flying and Rush in those spaces.

name: Atom Klinger
description: Whenever you equip an artifact, this minion gains +Attack equal to the artifact's cost.

name: Underlord Xor'Xuul
description: Trial: Cast 6 spells that destroy a friendly minion. Destiny: Whenever a friendly minion dies, re-summon it on a random space.

name: Hexclaw
description: Dying Wish: The enemy General gains, "At the start of your turn, take 1 damage."

name: Carrion Collector
description: Dying Wish: Lower the cost of all minions with Dying Wish in your deck and action bar by 1.

name: Abyssal Tormentor
description: Provoke Your Shadow Creep deals damage equal to the number of friendly Shadow Creep.

name: Chittering Tiller
description: Frenzy Opening Gambit: Teleport the enemy General one space forward.

name: Gibbet
description: Whenever this attacks an enemy minion, destroy that minion and summon a Gibbet on that space.

name: Mortar-maw
description: Ranged Whenever this minion attacks, it also damages enemies around its target.

name: Beastclad Hunter
description: Takes no damage from minions with less Attack.

name: Oropsisaur
description: Grow: +1/+1. Whenever another friendly minion with Grow survives damage, that minion grows.

name: Krater
description: Opening Gambit: Deal 1 damage to everything (including itself).

name: Hatefurnace
description: Trial: Cast 7 spells that cause a minion to gain +Attack. Destiny: Minions summoned from your action bar gain Rush and Frenzy.

name: Haruspex
description: Whenever this minion takes damage, your opponent draws a card.

name: Cloudcaller
description: Opening Gambit: Your Bloodbound Spell refreshes and is Lesser Waterball this turn.

name: Malicious Wisp
description: Opening Gambit: Take a mana crystal from your opponent. Dying Wish: Give back the mana crystal.

name: Fenrir Berserker
description: Dying Wish: Summon a Fenrir Warmaster on this space.

name: Meltwater Moose
description: When this minion is summoned, Stun it.

name: Oak in the Nemeton
description: Trial: Have 5 token minions with different names. Destiny: Friendly token minions have +4/+4.

name: Disciple of Yggdra
description: When an enemy is Stunned, transform this minion into Yggdra's Voracity.

name: Yggdra's Voracity
description: Whenever an enemy is Stunned, fully heal this minion.

name: Thicket Augur
description: Intensify: Summon 1 Treant with Provoke nearby.

name: Mirrorrim
description: Opening Gambit: Shuffle three copies of a friendly minion into your deck.

name: Aer Pridebeak
description: Whenever your opponent casts a spell, restore 1 Health to your General.

name: Alcuin Fugitive
description: At the end of any turn you cast a spell, put a copy of the most recently cast spell into your action bar.

name: Orbo the Ostentatious
description: Opening Gambit: Transform the cards in your action bar into random prismatic legendary cards.

name: Sellsoul
description: Dying Wish: Deal 4 damage to YOUR General.

name: Mythron Wanderer
description: Trial: Have no duplicate cards in your deck. Destiny: Your minions have +1/+1.

name: Riftwalker
description: Airdrop Intensify: Deal 1 damage to everything around it.

name: Fizzling Mystic
description: Opening Gambit: Deal 2 damage to an enemy OR restore 2 Health to a friendly minion or General.

name: Araras Prophet
description: Whenever you replace a card, shuffle a Brilliant Plume into your deck.

name: Lodestar
description: Airdrop, Forcefield At the end of BOTH players' turns, pull some things to this minion.

name: Chirpuka
description: Whenever your opponent summons a minion, summon a 2/1 Puka with Provoke in front of it.

name: Mnemovore
description: Whenever you summon a minion, burn three cards from your opponent's deck.

name: Scarzig
description: If this minion destroys an enemy and survives, friendly Scarzig ANYWHERE transform into Feather Knights.

name: Hsuku
description: At the end of any player's turn, give one of their minions a random buff and keyword (excluding Hsuku).

description: Clone another entity and replace self.

description: Move target to any unoccupied space in front of a General.

description: Give friendly minions directly in front of and behind your General +2/+2.  If they have Zeal, they cannot be targeted by enemy spells.

description: If you have three or more Shadow Creep, draw 2 cards.

name: Deep Impact
description: Deal damage to a minion to reduce its Health to 1.

description: Draw cards from your opponent's deck to fill your action bar.

description: Steal Health from an enemy minion for each friendly Shadow Creep (but not more than its Health).

description: Draw a minion from your opponent's deck. It gains +1/+1.

description: Draw an artifact from your deck.

name: Unleash the Evil
